🏠 Getting Into Your Home

18A Lutana Street, Lyons ACT 2606

Step 1
Park on the Left-Hand Driveway
Pull into the driveway and park on the left-hand side in front of the house. Please do not park on the right-hand driveway — there is a second house that needs access in and out at all times.
Step 2
Find the Lockbox on the Front Door
Walk to the front door — it's the timber door on the right as you face the house. You'll see a lockbox attached to the door handle. Enter the code from your check-in message to open it.
Step 3
Retrieve Your Keys & Enter
Open the lockbox and collect your keys. The blue key opens the front door. Please note: to lock the front door from inside you will need to manually lock it. Once inside, the sliding door can be opened from within.
You're In!
Welcome to Your Home Away From Home
Enjoy your stay! If you need anything at all, don't hesitate to reach out. Please tap the property guide below for WiFi details, house rules, and local tips.
⚠️ Parking reminder: Please only park on the left-hand side of the driveway. The right-hand driveway must remain clear for the neighbouring property at all times.
